statics.description: NICKNAME's power is equal to the greatest mana value among artifacts you control.

triggers.description: Whenever NICKNAME enters or attacks, choose target artifact card in your graveyard. You may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, return the chosen card to the battlefield.
